all_pictures_placed_verify_below.zh: 所有圖片都已放置 — 請在下方驗證！

all_scenes_practiced.zh: 所有場景都已練習完成！

all_scenes_recorded_ready_to_submit.en: All scenes recorded — ready to submit
all_scenes_recorded_ready_to_submit.zh: 所有場景都已錄製 — 可以提交了

all_tones_have_clear_shape_good_work.en: All tones have clear shape — good work.
all_tones_have_clear_shape_good_work.zh: 所有聲調形狀都很清楚 — 做得好。

all_vocabulary_words_used_excellent.zh: 所有詞彙都使用了 — 太棒了！

build_better_chinese_stories_with_pictur.en: Build better Chinese stories with picture prompts, voice recording, pronunciation feedback, and helpful language coaching.
build_better_chinese_stories_with_pictur.zh: 用圖片提示、語音錄製、發音回饋和語言指導，打造更好的中文故事。

check_which_words_you_used.zh: 檢查你使用了哪些詞彙

click_a_scene_slot_above_to_place_this_p.en: Click a scene slot above to place this picture.
click_a_scene_slot_above_to_place_this_p.zh: 點擊上方的場景位置以放置這張圖片。

complete_when_you_finish_all_images.en: You only complete your story when you finish recording all the images.
complete_when_you_finish_all_images.zh: 完成所有圖片的錄音後，你的故事才算完成。

create_story_based_on_images.en: Create your story based on the images below.
create_story_based_on_images.zh: 請根據下方的圖片創作你的故事。

complete_picture_based_story_tasks_recor.en: Complete picture-based story tasks, record Mandarin speech, and review Praat plus AI feedback.
complete_picture_based_story_tasks_recor.zh: 完成圖片故事任務、錄製普通話語音，並查看 Praat 及 AI 回饋。

dip_down_first_then_rise_back_the_lowest.en: Dip down first, then rise back — the lowest point matters most.
dip_down_first_then_rise_back_the_lowest.zh: 先降後升 — 最低點最重要。

drag_a_picture_to_a_slot_or_click_to_sel.en: Drag a picture to a slot, or click to select then click a slot.
drag_a_picture_to_a_slot_or_click_to_sel.zh: 把圖片拖到某個位置，或點擊選取後再點擊位置。

drag_each_picture_into_the_correct_scene.en: Drag each picture into the correct scene slot, then verify the sequence to unlock speaking practice.
drag_each_picture_into_the_correct_scene.zh: 把每張圖片拖到正確的場景位置，然後驗證順序以解鎖口說練習。

for_each_image_record_and_see_feedback.en: For each image, record your voice and see the system feedback.
for_each_image_record_and_see_feedback.zh: 針對每一張圖片，你需要錄音並查看系統回饋。

grammar_step_action_copy.en: This is the sentence pattern to use when you record. Read it over, then continue.
grammar_step_action_copy.zh: 這是錄音時要用的句型，看熟了再繼續。

isolate_problem_characters_from_the_tone.en: Isolate problem characters from the Tone Drill panel and repeat them 5× before recording the full sentence.
isolate_problem_characters_from_the_tone.zh: 從聲調練習面板中找出有問題的字，重複念 5 次後再錄完整句子。

keep_pitch_high_and_completely_flat_thro.en: Keep pitch high and completely flat throughout.
keep_pitch_high_and_completely_flat_thro.zh: 保持音高高且全程平直。

keep_practicing_try_to_make_the_tone_sha.en: Keep practicing — try to make the tone shapes clearer.
keep_practicing_try_to_make_the_tone_sha.zh: 繼續練習 — 試著讓聲調形狀更清楚。

match_key_words_to_each_story_scene.en: Answer a few quick questions about the story's key words
match_key_words_to_each_story_scene.zh: 回答幾題故事關鍵詞彙的選擇題

monitor_student_recordings_inspect_speec.en: Monitor student recordings, inspect speech metrics, and support narrative development.
monitor_student_recordings_inspect_speec.zh: 監控學生錄音、查看語音指標，並支援敘事發展。

needs_a_clear_pitch_contour_and_transcri.en: Needs a clear pitch contour and transcript. Try one complete sentence, or use Chinese/Taiwanese Whisper.
needs_a_clear_pitch_contour_and_transcri.zh: 需要清晰的音高曲線與逐字稿。試著說一個完整句子，或使用中文／台語 Whisper。

no_long_pauses_smooth_delivery.zh: 沒有長停頓 — 流暢表達

now_work_on_pronunciation_record_again_a.en: Now work on pronunciation — record again and focus on the tones. ↑
now_work_on_pronunciation_record_again_a.zh: 現在練習發音 — 再錄一次，專注在聲調上。↑

pitch_movement_estimated_for_each_mandar.en: Pitch movement estimated for each Mandarin character.
pitch_movement_estimated_for_each_mandar.zh: 估算每個普通話字的音高變化。

practice_again_you_haven_t_used_all_the_.en: Practice again — you haven't used all the scene words yet
practice_again_you_haven_t_used_all_the_.zh: 再練習一次 — 你還沒使用所有場景詞彙

put_it_back_into_the_full_sentence_and_r.en: Put it back into the full sentence and record again.
put_it_back_into_the_full_sentence_and_r.zh: 放回完整句子並再次錄音。

put_the_story_pictures_in_the_right_orde.en: Put the story pictures in the right order
put_the_story_pictures_in_the_right_orde.zh: 把故事圖片排成正確順序

raise_your_hand_from_here_and_your_teach.en: Raise your hand from here and your teacher will see it on the dashboard.
raise_your_hand_from_here_and_your_teach.zh: 點此舉手，老師會在儀表板上看到。

record_your_mandarin_story_out_loud.en: Record your Mandarin story out loud
record_your_mandarin_story_out_loud.zh: 把你的普通話故事大聲說出來並錄音

select_a_real_situation_students_may_mee.en: Select a real situation students may meet in daily life, study the six connected picture cues, prepare useful Mandarin phrases, and record each cue for Praat prosody and Gemini language feedback.
select_a_real_situation_students_may_mee.zh: 選擇學生日常生活中可能遇到的真實情境，研究六張相連的圖片提示，準備實用的普通話片語，並為每個提示錄音，獲得 Praat 韻律分析與 Gemini 語言回饋。

start_as_high_as_you_can_and_drop_sharpl.en: Start as high as you can and drop sharply to the bottom.
start_as_high_as_you_can_and_drop_sharpl.zh: 從最高處開始，然後急速下降到最低。

start_mid_push_pitch_up_to_the_top_like_.en: Start mid, push pitch up to the top — like asking a question.
start_mid_push_pitch_up_to_the_top_like_.zh: 從中間開始，把音高推到最高 — 像在問問題。

stay_on_your_task_your_teacher_can_see_t.en: Stay on your task. Your teacher can see this request.
stay_on_your_task_your_teacher_can_see_t.zh: 請繼續你的任務，老師已經看到這個請求。

tone_accuracy_score_shown_in_the_summary.en: Tone accuracy score shown in the summary above
tone_accuracy_score_shown_in_the_summary.zh: 聲調準確度分數顯示於上方摘要

too_fast_slow_each_tone.zh: 太快 — 放慢每個聲調

try_to_use_every_word_above_in_your_next.en: Try to use every word above in your next recording. ↑ Record again
try_to_use_every_word_above_in_your_next.zh: 試著在下一次錄音中使用上方每個詞彙。↑ 再錄一次

use_your_vocabulary_map_to_build_one_or_.en: Use your vocabulary map to build one or two sentences, then record.
use_your_vocabulary_map_to_build_one_or_.zh: 運用你的詞彙地圖造一兩個句子，然後錄音。

vocab_step_action_copy.en: Tap the mic next to each word to practice saying it, then continue.
vocab_step_action_copy.zh: 點每個詞彙旁的麥克風練習發音，準備好了再繼續。

you_ve_completed_the_full_story_review_y.en: You've completed the full story. Review your recordings or record any scene again.
you_ve_completed_the_full_story_review_y.zh: 你已完成整個故事。可以檢視你的錄音，或重新錄製任何場景。

your_teacher_will_create_and_publish_spe.en: Your teacher will create and publish speaking activities. They'll appear here when ready.
your_teacher_will_create_and_publish_spe.zh: 你的老師將會建立並發布口語練習活動，準備好後會顯示在這裡。

your_teacher_will_publish_speaking_activ.en: Your teacher will publish speaking activities here. Check back once materials are ready!
your_teacher_will_publish_speaking_activ.zh: 你的老師會在這裡發布口語練習活動。請稍後再回來查看！

your_transcript_will_appear_after_record.en: Your transcript will appear after recording.
your_transcript_will_appear_after_record.zh: 錄音後將顯示你的逐字稿。
